main_problems: Consultation inquiries submitted online or via chatbot get no same-day response — clients book elsewhere
No system to follow up on leads who expressed interest but didn't schedule
Post-treatment clients rarely hear from the practice again — no rebooking sequence
No automated review request after a successful treatment
Promotions and monthly specials are sent manually with inconsistent timing

recommended_automations.name: Consultation Inquiry Fast-Follow
recommended_automations.description: When a consultation request comes in via chatbot or web form, an automated SMS fires within 5 minutes: 'Hi [name]! This is Luxe Aesthetics — we received your inquiry and would love to schedule your free consultation. What day works best for you?' Followed by email confirmation with FAQ and prep info.
recommended_automations.trigger: Consultation form submitted or chatbot lead captured
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Speed-to-response is the #1 factor in converting aesthetics leads — same-minute reply wins the booking

recommended_automations.name: Lead Nurture Sequence (Non-Bookers)
recommended_automations.description: Prospects who expressed interest but didn't book receive a 3-touch follow-up: Day 1 SMS, Day 3 email with before/after info and FAQ, Day 7 final SMS offer ('We're holding a spot for you — reply YES to lock it in').
recommended_automations.trigger: Lead captured but no appointment booked within 24 hours
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Converts 15–25% of cold leads who needed a nudge

recommended_automations.name: Post-Treatment Rebooking Sequence
recommended_automations.description: Triggered based on treatment type: Botox clients get a follow-up at 3 months ('Your Botox may be starting to wear — want to lock in your touch-up before we fill up?'), fillers at 6 months, laser at 4 weeks.
recommended_automations.trigger: Treatment completion date + interval based on treatment type
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Increases repeat visit rate — each repeat Botox session = $300–$600 revenue

recommended_automations.name: Post-Treatment Review Request
recommended_automations.description: 2–3 days after a successful treatment, send an SMS: 'We hope you're loving your results! If you're happy, a quick Google review would mean so much to our small team. [LINK]'
recommended_automations.estimated_value: 4–8 new reviews per month — social proof is critical for aesthetics bookings

recommended_automations.name: Monthly Promotions Broadcast
recommended_automations.description: Monthly SMS/email blast to opted-in client list with current specials, seasonal offers, or new service announcements. Scheduled to send first Tuesday of each month at 10am.
recommended_automations.estimated_value: Each broadcast generates 5–15 rebookings from dormant clients

implementation_timeline: 5–7 business days to build and test
